# hush_infisical_integration (Data Source)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Hush Security Infisical integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "hush_infisical_integration" "by_id" {
  id = "int-abc123"
}

# Lookup by name
data "hush_infisical_integration" "by_name" {
  name = "my-infisical"
}

output "infisical_status" {
  value = data.hush_infisical_integration.by_name.status
}

output "infisical_url" {
  value = data.hush_infisical_integration.by_name.base_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Infisical integration
- `name` (String) The name of the Infisical integration

### Read-Only

- `base_url` (String) The Infisical base URL (e.g., https://app.infisical.com)
- `description` (String) The description of the Infisical integration
- `onprem_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the on-premises deployment to associate with this integration
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration
- `status_message` (String) The status message providing additional details about the integration status
